alkylation reagent: free sulfhydryl groups were modified by adding iodoacetate.
cleavage agent: The precipitated proteins were digested with trypsin (TPCK-treated, Worthington Biochemical Corporation) and endoproteinase Glu-C (Roche).
instrument: analyzed using a Q Exactive Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer.
labeling: the label-free spectral shift of the SV2A intrinsic tryptophan fluorescence.
